body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2025-69534", "cvss": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 5.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:L/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N/E:P"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-248", "name": "Uncaught Exception"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-400", "name": "Uncontrolled Resource Consumption"}], "description": "Python-Markdown version 3.8 contain a vulnerability where malformed HTML-like sequences can cause html.parser.HTMLParser to raise an unhandled AssertionError during Markdown parsing. Because Python-Markdown does not catch this exception, any application that processes attacker-controlled Markdown may crash. This enables remote, unauthenticated Denial of Service in web applications, documentation systems, CI/CD pipelines, and any service that renders untrusted Markdown. The issue was acknowledged by the vendor and fixed in version 3.8.1. This issue causes a remote Denial of Service in any application parsing untrusted Markdown, and can lead to Information Disclosure through uncaught exceptions.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00566, "percentile": 0.427}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-5wmx-573v-2qwq", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-03-05T21:59:47Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-5wmx-573v-2qwq", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-5wmx-573v-2qwq"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2025-69534"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-03-05T15:16:11Z", "published_at": "2026-03-05T15:30:36Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-69534", "https://github.com/Python-Markdown/markdown/issues/1534", "https://github.com/Python-Markdown/markdown", "https://github.com/Python-Markdown/markdown/actions/runs/15736122892", "https://github.com/Python-Markdown/markdown/pull/1535", "http://www.openwall.com/lists/oss-security/2026/03/06/4", "https://github.com/pypa/advisory-database/tree/main/vulns/markdown/PYSEC-2026-89.yaml", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-5wmx-573v-2qwq"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "", "summary": "Python-Markdown has an Uncaught Exception", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-06T00:53:02Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-5wmx-573v-2qwq", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.8.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "Markdown"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 3.8.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Python-Markdown has an Uncaught Exception
